name: King of the Couch: Zoovival
short_description: Real-time natural selection! Who will survive, a bear with a cheese or a shark with a shotgun? King of the Couch: Zoovival is the latest evolution of the platform battle arena game genre! Fight as an animal, with a wide assortment of weapons, on multiple unique battle arenas in King of the Couch: Zoovival.
detailed_description:
The game

Nature is harsh. Only the most adapted will survive. Following a thorough study of nature, Loophole Interactive is proud to bring you King of the Couch: Zoovival! Take up the role as one of nature's toughest zoovivors as they battle it out using tools commonly found in nature, such as a black hole gun. Save yourself from a cheese wheel running amok by swinging yourself to safety using a grappling hook. Chug baguettes at your friends under the wrathful eyes of a pissed of volcano. All part of natural selection!

Features:

  • 2D battle platformer with 3D graphics
  • Up to 4 players versus eachother
  • Use a grappling hook to move around
  • Lots of funky weapons commonly found in nature
  • All-natural, realistic weapon-classes
  • Play as a bear, a fish, a frog, chicken, penguin, toothless t-rex, or a sewing lady
  • Various arenas with game-changing mechanics
